news-global-econ.title: Actor and former 'SNL' star slams major airline for his seat downgrade: ‘I paid for first class’
news-global-econ.description: An actor and comedian has alleged that American Airlines downgraded him from first class to economy on a red-eye flight, sparking controversy over airline practices.

news-global-econ.title: Marilyn Monroe's former Palm Springs hideaway hits the market for $3.3M
news-global-econ.description: Marilyn Monroe's former Palm Springs sanctuary hits the market for $3.3 million. The iconic 'Doll House' offers rare Hollywood history in Vista Las Palmas.

news-global-econ.title: The unlikely tool Trump is eyeing to tackle rising oil prices amid the Iran conflict
news-global-econ.description: War-risk insurance costs surge as conflict threatens oil shipments through Strait of Hormuz, potentially driving up gas prices for American consumers.

news-global-econ.title: CENTCOM issues safety warning to Iranian civilians as regime uses ‘heavily populated’ areas for launches
news-global-econ.description: CENTCOM warned Iranian civilians to avoid military-linked sites, accusing Tehran of launching drones and missiles from populated areas.

news-global-econ.title: White House says oil price spike is temporary as Trump pushes energy dominance amid Iran war
news-global-econ.description: Karoline Leavitt says oil price spike from Iran conflict will be short-lived as President Trump's energy dominance strategy stabilizes markets and eases pressure on American consumers.

news-global-soc.title: Eileen Gu serves as grand marshal for Chinese New Year parade in San Francisco
news-global-soc.description: Controversial Olympic skier Eileen Gu was the grand marshal for the Chinese New Year festivities that took place in San Francisco on Saturday.

news-global-soc.title: Alysa Liu speaks out on Eileen Gu's decision to compete for China over US and political backlash
news-global-soc.description: Alysa Liu defends Eileen Gu's decision to compete for China at Olympics, calling criticism hypocritical. Both Bay Area athletes faced unfair comparisons.
